Container.Name: sendrec
Container.Overview: SendRec is an open-source async video platform built for Europe. Record your screen, share videos with your team, and keep full control of your data.[br][br] [b]Features:[/b] screen and camera recording (Chrome, Safari, Firefox), drag-and-drop upload, automatic transcription with whisper.cpp, AI summaries, timestamped comments, custom branding, viewer analytics, playlists, and embeddable player.[br][br] [b]Requirements:[/b] PostgreSQL 16+ and S3-compatible storage (Garage, MinIO, AWS S3, Backblaze B2, etc.) must be installed separately.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL 16+ and S3-compatible storage (Garage, MinIO, AWS S3, etc.)
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: video messaging async recording screen-recording loom alternative gdpr eu

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the web interface and API.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Replace 192.168.1.X with your PostgreSQL host IP.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for signing authentication tokens. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Public URL where SendRec is accessible. Used for share links, CORS, and cookies. Example: https://videos.example.com

Config.Name: S3 Endpoint
Config.Description: S3-compatible API endpoint. For Garage: http://IP:3900. For AWS: https://s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com

Config.Name: S3 Public Endpoint
Config.Description: Browser-reachable S3 URL for presigned URLs. Required if S3_ENDPOINT is not reachable from the browser (e.g. internal Docker hostname). Leave empty if S3_ENDPOINT is already browser-reachable.

Config.Name: S3 Bucket
Config.Description: S3 bucket name for video storage.

Config.Name: S3 Access Key
Config.Description: S3 access key ID.

Config.Name: S3 Secret Key
Config.Description: S3 secret access key.

Config.Name: S3 Region
Config.Description: S3 region. Must match your storage provider's region.

Config.Name: S3 Checksum Calculation
Config.Description: Set to 'when_required' for S3-compatible providers (Garage, MinIO, Backblaze). Leave default for AWS S3.

Config.Name: S3 Checksum Validation
Config.Description: Set to 'when_required' for S3-compatible providers (Garage, MinIO, Backblaze). Leave default for AWS S3.

Config.Name: Max Videos per Month
Config.Description: Maximum videos per user per month. 0 = unlimited.

Config.Name: Max Video Duration (seconds)
Config.Description: Maximum recording duration in seconds. 0 = unlimited.

Config.Name: Max Playlists
Config.Description: Maximum playlists per user. 0 = unlimited.

Config.Name: Max Upload Size (bytes)
Config.Description: Maximum upload size in bytes. Default is 500 MB.

Config.Name: Whisper Model
Config.Description: Path to directory containing the whisper model file (ggml-small.bin, ~466 MB). Download from https://huggingface.co/ggerganov/whisper.cpp/resolve/main/ggml-small.bin. Leave empty to disable transcription.

Config.Name: Transcription Enabled
Config.Description: Enable automatic video transcription using whisper.cpp. Requires a whisper model file.

Config.Name: Whisper Model Path
Config.Description: Path to the whisper model file inside the container.

Config.Name: AI Enabled
Config.Description: Enable AI-generated video summaries and chapter markers. Requires an OpenAI-compatible API.

Config.Name: AI Base URL
Config.Description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL. Examples: https://api.mistral.ai, https://api.openai.com, http://192.168.1.X:11434 (Ollama)

Config.Name: AI API Key
Config.Description: API key for the AI provider. Can be empty for Ollama.

Config.Name: AI Model
Config.Description: AI model name. Examples: mistral-small-latest, gpt-4o-mini, llama3.2

Config.Name: AI Timeout
Config.Description: HTTP timeout for AI API requests. Increase for slow endpoints like local Ollama. Examples: 60s, 5m, 10m

Config.Name: Branding Enabled
Config.Description: Allow users to customize watch page branding (logo, colors, custom CSS).

Config.Name: API Docs Enabled
Config.Description: Serve interactive API documentation at /api/docs.

Config.Name: Frame Ancestors
Config.Description: Space-separated domains allowed to embed SendRec in iframes. Example: https://nextcloud.example.com
